description_long: This object is a handheld electronic gaming device resembling the classic Nintendo Game Boy, featuring a rectangular, off-white plastic body with a large greenish display screen on the upper half of the front. Below the screen, there are several physical controls: a black D-pad on the left, two red circular buttons labeled 'A' and 'B' on the right, and two smaller oval buttons for 'Start' and 'Select' beneath them. The front also displays printed text and branding, with a speaker grille located at the bottom right. The sides are plain except for a small slider switch, likely for power or volume control. The back is unadorned, with a smooth surface and no visible compartments or features. The device is compact, designed to be portable and easily held in one hand, and is constructed primarily from molded plastic with some internal electronic components.
description: A compact, off-white handheld gaming device with a greenish screen, physical buttons, and a speaker grille, resembling a classic Game Boy. It features a simple, rectangular plastic body with minimal side and rear detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, D-pad, A/B buttons, Start/Select buttons, speaker grille, and branding.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a small slider switch and the device's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, smooth surface with no visible features or compartments.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a small slider switch and no additional features.
